text: Perform a complete legal analysis of the dispute. Identify the parties, their relationship, the core issue, the factual chronology, payment or performance issues, possible breach events, legal and contractual issues that can be inferred, likely obligations of each side, notice-related issues, possible liability exposure, dispute resolution implications, compliance concerns, evidence gaps, likely legal outcome, probable timeline, cost and risk factors, and the strongest next legal steps. Clearly distinguish between facts that are available, facts that are unclear, and facts that are missing. If contractual terms, notice details, or dispute resolution terms are not available, state that explic
snippet: Perform a complete legal analysis of the dispute. Identify the parties, their relationship, the core issue, the factual chronology, payment or performance issues, possible breach

meta.section: Perform a complete legal analysis of the dispute. Identify the parties, their relationship, the core issue, the factual
